name: Alert
description: Notification component for displaying messages, alerts, and notifications. Supports toast and banner variants with multiple states.

variant.description: Alert display variant - toast for floating notifications, banner for inline

state.description: Alert state determining color and default icon

icon.description: Custom icon (default icon based on state if not provided)

onClose.description: Callback when close button is clicked. If provided, close button is shown.

primaryAction.description: Primary action button config: { label: string, onClick: () => void }

secondaryAction.description: Secondary action button config: { label: string, onClick: () => void }

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Alert uses role='alert' for screen reader announcement. Provide meaningful title and description.

commonMistakes.correction: Provide onClose callback to show close button

examples.title: Information Alert
examples.code: <Alert state="information" title="Update Available" description="A new version is available for download." />

examples.title: Success Alert
examples.code: <Alert state="success" title="Success!" description="Your changes have been saved." />

examples.title: Warning Alert
examples.code: <Alert state="warning" title="Warning" description="This action cannot be undone." />

examples.title: Error Alert
examples.code: <Alert state="error" title="Error" description="Something went wrong. Please try again." />

examples.title: With Close Button
examples.code: <Alert state="information" title="Notification" description="Click X to dismiss." onClose={() => setShow(false)} />

examples.title: With Actions
examples.code:
<Alert
  state="information"
  title="Confirm Action"
  description="Do you want to proceed?"
  primaryAction={{ label: 'Confirm', onClick: handleConfirm }}
  secondaryAction={{ label: 'Cancel', onClick: handleCancel }}
/>

examples.title: Banner Variant
examples.code: <Alert variant="banner" state="warning" title="Maintenance" description="System maintenance scheduled for tonight." />
